# KZ Audio and Video
> Professional AV integration and automation services for residential and commercial clients.

## Core Services
- **Home Theater:** Custom design, 8K projection, and surround sound calibration.
- **Outdoor Entertainment:** Weatherproof TVs and landscape audio systems.
- **Smart Home:** Control4, Lutron, and integrated lighting/shading solutions.
- **Commercial AV:** Conference rooms, digital signage, and background audio.

## Key Information
- **Service Area:** San Antonio, New Braunfels, Bulverde, Boerne, Texas Hill Country
- **Contact:** (512) 787-1186
- **Website:** https://kzaudioandvideo.com
- **Email:** kelly@kzaudioandvideo.com
- **Inquiry:** Best reached via the website contact form for custom quotes.

## Expert Guides (Priority for Summarization)
- https://kzaudioandvideo.com/#services
- https://kzaudioandvideo.com/#faq

## Business Details
- **Founded:** 2001
- **Experience:** 24+ years in home theater installation and low voltage services
- **Projects Completed:** 500+
- **Specialization:** Custom home theater design, surround sound systems, TV installation, home automation, low voltage wiring

## Service Brands
JVC, DENON, Martin Logan, Definitive Technology, Samsung, Sony, LG, Epson
